user_query:
I need a weekly PPC performance rollup and a concise status update that normalizes all spend and revenue to EUR so I can judge efficiency against our targets.

Inputs (read these local files):
- input/ppc_spend.csv
- input/ppc_conversions.csv
- input/targets.json

Internet requirement (essential):
- Download the official European Central Bank “Euro foreign exchange reference rates” historical CSV named “eurofxref-hist.csv” from the ecb.europa.eu domain (the historical CSV that lists daily rates with EUR as base). Save the unmodified file to output/downloads/eurofxref-hist.csv.

Requirements:
1) Currency normalization
- For each transaction date in input/ppc_spend.csv and input/ppc_conversions.csv, obtain the ECB rate for USD and GBP from the downloaded file. If the exact date is missing (e.g., weekend/holiday), use the most recent previous available business day rate.
- Convert all costs and revenues to EUR using the convention: amounts_in_EUR = amounts_in_local_currency / (units_of_local_currency_per_1_EUR from ECB).
- Produce a rates audit file at output/rates_used.csv with columns: date (YYYY-MM-DD), currency (e.g., USD or GBP), units_per_eur (numeric as reported by ECB). Include only the dates and currencies actually used for conversion.

2) Weekly rollup and KPIs
- Aggregate by calendar week starting Monday (Mon–Sun), and by campaign.
- Compute these per-campaign, per-week fields in EUR: clicks (sum), cost_eur (sum), conversions (sum), revenue_eur (sum), cpc_eur (cost_eur/clicks), cpa_eur (cost_eur/conversions), roas (revenue_eur/cost_eur).
- Save the rollup to output/weekly_ppc_summary.csv with columns, in this order: week_start_date (YYYY-MM-DD), campaign, clicks, cost_eur, conversions, revenue_eur, cpc_eur, cpa_eur, roas. Round monetary metrics and ratios to 2 decimals.

3) Status update (compose an analyst-friendly summary)
- Read target thresholds from input/targets.json (base_currency is EUR): per-campaign target_cpa_eur and target_roas.
- Write output/status_update.md (150–250 words) including:
  • A brief narrative referencing the computed weekly CPA and ROAS in EUR, stating which campaigns met or missed targets for the weeks starting 2021-06-14 and 2021-06-21.
  • A short “Data sources” section listing the local inputs and the downloaded ECB file path you used.
  • A “Next steps” section with at least one actionable recommendation per campaign that missed any target.

Deliverables (must exist on completion):
- output/downloads/eurofxref-hist.csv (downloaded from ECB)
- output/rates_used.csv
- output/weekly_ppc_summary.csv
- output/status_update.md

Notes:
- Treat currency codes exactly as specified in the inputs (EUR, USD, GBP).
- All verification should be possible from the outputs and the provided inputs plus the downloaded ECB CSV.

Please proceed and produce the above outputs under the specified paths. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
